title: bus.tengine.antidefer.flagged v1
description: When: The anti-deferment engine detects that an agent appears to be deferring work (making plans instead of acting, writing documentation instead of code). Source: /tengine. Emitted as a warning that the agent may be stalling or gaming the progress model.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

agent_name.description: Name of the agent flagged for potential deferment.

deferment_summary.description: Human-readable explanation of what behavior triggered the flag, e.g. 'agent wrote 3 planning docs without touching code'.

evidence_files.description: Absolute paths to files that provide evidence of the deferment behavior.
